prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: FLL-BONESPUR-60012-PARENT Product Type: HARDWARE_HANDLE Brand (from catalog): Flatline-Ops Existing Title: Flatline Ops Bonespur Throw Lever and Machined Broach Screw Ultra Strong Description: Tired of large, big clunky throw levers? Do they get in the way of your field of view when locating your turret position or bubble level? Our new BoneSpur throw lever is changing the way we view these products.

This unique and precision-engineered lever is now available for civilian use. Machined from skeletonized ultra-strong 7075-T6 aircraft aluminum, the "ringless" ultra-light throw lever boasts a non-obstructive window custom fit for the Leupold Mark5 magnification adjustment ring. The outer surface is machined with our Bone-Saw (trademark) teeth which provide maximum grip for control in any condition, bare-handed or gloved.

Features:
Bone-Saw outer spines to enhance grip for magnification manipulation
Hollow-View design, for a non-obstructed view of turrets, bubble level, and other vegetation on your scope
Provides optimum control with gloves in harsh conditions
Ring-less mounting for minimal real estate and weightlessness
Top access tool point for easy installation and removal
Ultra-light high strength 7075-T6 aircraft aluminum
Hard-anodized finish
For Leupold Mark 5HD only at this time
Patent Pending Search Terms: throw lever scope accessories rifle night vision thermal spotting red dot airsoft shooting targets pistols rest range hunting gear equipment turkey accessories gun range accessories targets protection rifle case air pellet gun tools Features: - BONESPUR THROW LEVER - Designed for use with the Leupold Mark 5HD, the BoneSpur throw lever is changing the way we view these products. It features Bone-Saw outer spines to enhance grip for magnification manipulation. - HOLLOW-VIEW DESIGN - The BoneSpur features the Hollow-View design for non-obstructed view of turrets, bubble level and other vegetation on your scope. It provides optimum control with gloves in harsh conditions. - RINGLESS MOUNTING - The ring-less mounting system offers minimal real estate and weightlessness, with a top access tool point for easy installation and removal. - ULTRA-LIGHT CONSTRUCTION - Made of durable high strength 7075-T6 aircraft aluminum, the BoneSpur throw lever is ideal for any weather condition. It features hard anodized finish that is corrosion-resistant. - MADE IN THE USA - The BoneSpur is proudly made in the USA; Material: 7075-T6 aircraft aluminum; Finish: hard anodized; Patent Pending: For Leupold Mark 5HD only at this time; Colors: Black; Flat Dark Earth === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Flatline Ops BoneSpur Throw Lever Black for Leupold Mark 5HD

anthropic.title_differentiation: Hollow-View Design, Ringless Mounting, 7075-T6 Aircraft Aluminum, Bone-Saw Grip, Hard Anodized, Made USA

openai.title_differentiation: Leupold Mark 5HD Only, Skeletonized 7075-T6 Aluminum, Hollow-View Design, Bone-Saw Grip, Hard Anodized
